series_metadata.series_description: Case files from Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) investigative units pertaining to criminal investigations that have not been solved yet or resulted in a charge. Records include, but are not limited to, request for assistance, reports, evidence submission sheets, custody records, recordings, subpoenas, laboratory notes, and photos.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Once case is solved, per applicable investigative records retention schedule. Otherwise, permanently. ; Paper: Once case is solved, per applicable investigative records retention schedule. Otherwise, permanently, unless scanned and saved electronically
